source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider the oscillator circuit shown in <image>. The function of the network (shown in dotted lines) consisting of the $100 \mathrm{k} \Omega$ resistor in series with the two diodes connected is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: introduce amplitude stabilization by preventing the op amp from saturating and thus producing sinusoidal oscillations of fixed amplitude

choice_map.A: introduce amplitude stabilization by preventing the op amp from saturating and thus producing sinusoidal oscillations of fixed amplitude
choice_map.B: Introduce amplitude stabilization by forcing the opamp to swing between positive and negative saturation and thus producing square wave oscillations of fixed amplitude
choice_map.C: Introduce frequency stabilization by forcing the circuit to oscillate at a single frequency
choice_map.D: Enable the loop gain to take on a value that produces square wave oscillations
